allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; a=json.load\(open\('package.json'\)\); b=json.load\(sys.stdin\); new={k:v for k,v in b.get\('dependencies',{}\).items\(\) if k not in a.get\('dependencies',{}\)}; print\('NEW DEPS:', json.dumps\(new, indent=2\)\)")

PowerShell(git show HEAD:src/lib/trey-i/vertex.server.ts | Out-File -Encoding utf8 "$env:TEMP\\vertex_head.ts"; Compare-Object \(Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\vertex_head.ts"\) \(Get-Content "src/lib/trey-i/vertex.server.ts"\) | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($urls = @\("http://localhost:3000/onboarding", "http://localhost:3000/onboarding/voice"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { try { $req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\($url\); $req.Timeout = 5000; $res = $req.GetResponse\(\); Write-Host "$url -> $\([int]$res.StatusCode\)"; $res.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Host "$url -> ERROR: $_" } })

PowerShell($urls = @\("http://localhost:3000/onboarding", "http://localhost:3000/onboarding/voice"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { try { $req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\($url\); $req.Timeout = 8000; $res = $req.GetResponse\(\); Write-Host "$url -> $\([int]$res.StatusCode\)"; $res.Close\(\) } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $code = [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; Write-Host "$url -> $code" } catch { Write-Host "$url -> ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($urls = @\("http://localhost:3000/onboarding/voice"\); foreach \($url in $urls\) { try { $req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\($url\); $req.Timeout = 8000; $res = $req.GetResponse\(\); Write-Host "$url -> $\([int]$res.StatusCode\)"; $res.Close\(\) } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $code = [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; Write-Host "$url -> $code" } catch { Write-Host "$url -> ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
